metadata.purpose: Resource nodes for crafting and survival
metadata.global_modifier: Druids/Rangers gain +5 to Harvest DC checks.

flora.name: Kingsleaf
flora.appearance: Broad, golden-veined leaves that shimmer in sunlight.
flora.raw_effect: Chewing the leaf stabilizes a dying creature (1 charge of Healer's Kit).

flora.name: Ash Blossom
flora.appearance: A grey, soot-covered flower that glows dull red when touched.
flora.raw_effect: Deals 1 fire damage if handled without gloves.

flora.name: Void Shroom
flora.appearance: Translucent purple fungi that seems to absorb torchlight.
flora.raw_effect: Eating raw grants Darkvision 30ft but causes 1d4 psychic damage.

flora.name: Salt Husk
flora.appearance: Brittle, white succulent that tastes of brine.
flora.raw_effect: Can be ground into salt to preserve 1lb of meat for 30 days.

flora.name: Ghost Orchid
flora.appearance: A floating, semi-ethereal white flower that emits a faint chime.
flora.refined_result: Potion of Etherealness / Oil of Sharpness
flora.raw_effect: Allows the user to see into the Ethereal Plane for 1 minute.

flora.name: Mana-Tinged Weed
flora.appearance: Jagged blue grass that sparks with static electricity.
flora.refined_result: Spell Scroll Ink / Potion of Mana (Variant)
flora.raw_effect: Restores one Level 1 spell slot, but causes 1 level of Exhaustion.

flora.name: Ironbark Sap
flora.appearance: Thick, metallic-smelling resin from Ironbark trees.
flora.raw_effect: Increases AC by 1 for 1 hour; makes clothes stiff and uncomfortable.

flora.name: Serpent's Tongue
flora.appearance: A forked red fern that smells of rotting meat.
flora.raw_effect: Coating a blade in raw juice adds 1d4 poison damage (lasts 1 hit).

flora.name: Frost Lichen
flora.appearance: Crystalline blue moss that feels freezing to the touch.
flora.refined_result: Potion of Frost Giant Strength / Cold Resistance
flora.raw_effect: Prevents food/potions from spoiling in high-heat biomes.

flora.name: Blood Briar
flora.appearance: Thorny vines that drink blood from the soil; thorns are deep crimson.
flora.raw_effect: Grants 5 Temp HP but the user cannot be healed by magic for 1 hour.
